verification.title: Get Verified
verification.loadError: Failed to load verification data. Please try again.
verification.alreadyVerifiedMessage: Your identity has already been verified. No further action is needed.
verification.step1Hint: Select your country and ID type, then upload the front (and back if required) of your identification document.
verification.step2Hint: Take or upload a clear selfie photo for identity verification.
verification.step3Hint: Review the extracted information below. Correct any errors before submitting your verification request.
verification.step4Hint: Your verification request has been submitted successfully. You will be notified once it is reviewed.
verification.uploadIdError: Failed to upload ID document. Please try again.
verification.uploadSelfieError: Failed to upload selfie. Please try again.
verification.submitError: Failed to submit verification. Please try again.
verification.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Only JPG and PNG images are accepted.
verification.cameraError: Could not access camera. Please check permissions or upload a file instead.
verification.resetWarning: Warning: This will delete your current ID documents and selfie. Your verification level (WKYC) will be reset to Level 0. You will need to upload new documents and re-submit for verification.

profile.passwordChanged: Your password has been changed successfully.
profile.changePasswordError: Failed to change password. Please try again.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Quick guidance for every feature in the app.

signIn.label: Sign in
signIn.description: Enter your username and password on the login screen, then tap Sign In. If you are new, tap 'Create an account' to register first.

rememberMe.label: Remember Me / Auto-login
rememberMe.description: Toggle 'Remember Me' on the login screen to stay signed in. The next time you open the app, it will log you in automatically without asking for your credentials again.

signUp.label: Create an account
signUp.description: Tap 'Create an account' on the login screen. Fill in your name, email, phone, username, and password, then tap 'Create Account'. You will be taken directly to identity verification.

openDashboard.label: Dashboard overview
openDashboard.description: After signing in you land on the Dashboard, which shows all your currency balances, a quick exchange widget, and recent activity.

balanceCards.label: Balance cards
balanceCards.description: Each card shows one currency account with its available and reserved balance. Tap a card to open the full account statement.

hideZero.label: Hide zero balances
hideZero.description: Use the 'Hide zero' toggle to show only accounts that have a non-zero balance.

favorites.label: Favorites
favorites.description: Tap the star icon on any balance card to mark it as a favourite. Use the 'Favourites only' toggle to show only your starred accounts.

quickExchange.label: Quick exchange
quickExchange.description: Use the currency converter widget on the Dashboard to get an indicative rate instantly without going to the Exchange screen.

viewStatement.label: Account statement
viewStatement.description: Tap any balance card to open its statement. Filter transactions by period using the dropdown at the top.

findRecipient.label: Find a recipient
findRecipient.description: On the Pay screen, enter the recipient's StealthID (e.g. VL10207) and tap Search. Their name, organisation, and verified status will appear before you proceed.

scanQR.label: Scan a QR code
scanQR.description: Tap the QR icon next to the search field to open the camera. Point it at a recipient's QR code — the app fills in their ID automatically.

fillForm.label: Enter amount and currency
fillForm.description: Choose the currency from your available balances, enter the amount, and add an optional memo for the recipient.

reviewConfirm.label: Review and confirm
reviewConfirm.description: Check all details on the review screen. If you have set a PIN, you will be asked to enter it before the payment is sent.

paymentHistory.label: Payment history
paymentHistory.description: After sending, the payment appears in Payment History (Profile → History) with its reference number and status.

yourQR.label: Your QR code
yourQR.description: Open the Receive tab (QR icon in the bottom navigation). Your personal QR code is displayed — others can scan it to pay you without typing your ID.

shareLink.label: Share your payment link
shareLink.description: Tap 'Share Payment Link' to send your payment link via any app (WhatsApp, email, SMS). The recipient clicks the link and is taken directly to the payment form.

stealthId.label: Your StealthID
stealthId.description: Your StealthID (e.g. VL10207) is shown below your QR code. Tap it to copy it to the clipboard and share it manually.

getQuote.label: Get a quote
getQuote.description: On the Exchange screen, select the currency you want to sell (From) and the currency you want to buy (To), enter the amount, and tap 'Get Quote'.

quoteExpiry.label: Quote expiry
quoteExpiry.description: A quote is only valid for a short countdown. If it expires, tap 'Get New Quote' to request a fresh rate.

bookDeal.label: Book the deal
bookDeal.description: Review the quote details (rate, amounts, fee) and tap 'Book Deal'. If you have a PIN set, enter it to confirm. The booked deal appears in Exchange History.

paymentHistory.label: Payment History
paymentHistory.description: Find all sent payments under Profile → Payment History. Each entry shows the date, reference, sender, recipient, amount, and status.

exchangeHistory.label: Exchange History
exchangeHistory.description: Find all booked FX deals under Profile → Exchange History. Each entry shows the currencies, rate, amounts, deal fee, and value date.

statement.label: Account Statement
statement.description: Tap any balance card on the Dashboard to open a detailed statement. Use the period filter to narrow down transactions by date range.

setPin.label: Set a PIN
setPin.description: Go to Profile and tap 'Set PIN'. Enter a 6-digit PIN, then confirm it. From then on, every payment and FX deal will require your PIN before it is processed.

changePin.label: Change your PIN
changePin.description: Go to Profile and tap 'Change PIN'. Enter your new 6-digit PIN and confirm it.

pinProtection.label: What is PIN-protected?
pinProtection.description: Once a PIN is set, it is required to send a payment and to book an FX deal. This prevents unauthorised transactions if your phone is unlocked.

changePassword.label: Change password
changePassword.description: Go to Profile → Change Password. Enter your current password and then your new password twice. Tap 'Change Password' to save.

language.label: Change language
language.description: Go to Profile → Settings and tap the current language. Select English, French, or Portuguese from the list. The entire app switches language immediately.

getVerified.label: Identity verification (KYC)
getVerified.description: Go to Profile → Get Verified to complete identity verification. Upload your ID document, take a selfie, and confirm your details. A verification link is generated for you to share.

logout.label: Sign out
logout.description: Tap 'Log Out' in the Profile screen. If Remember Me was on, your credentials are cleared and you will need to sign in again next time.

cantSignIn.label: Can't sign in
cantSignIn.description: Check your username and password carefully — they are case-sensitive. If the problem persists, try switching the Environment selector on the login screen.

paymentFailed.label: Payment failed
paymentFailed.description: Ensure you have sufficient available balance in the selected currency. Check that the recipient's StealthID is correct and that their account is active.

qrNotScanning.label: QR code not scanning
qrNotScanning.description: Make sure the app has camera permission (check your phone's settings). Hold the camera steady and ensure the QR code is fully within the frame.

pinForgotten.label: Forgot PIN
pinForgotten.description: Tap 'Forgot PIN?' on the PIN entry screen. You will be prompted to verify your identity and can then set a new PIN from your Profile.

pin.pinMismatch: PINs do not match. Try again.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Your mobile wallet for global payments and currency exchange.
onboarding.dashboardDesc: View all your currency accounts at a glance. Tap any account to see its statement.
onboarding.payDesc: Send instant payments to anyone with a PayID. Fast, secure, and easy.
onboarding.exchangeDesc: Convert between currencies at live market rates. Get quotes and book deals instantly.
onboarding.securityDesc: Protect your payments and exchanges with a 6-digit PIN code.
